steps.title: Target the research question
steps.content: The student wants to present what the study was trying to find out. The relevant note says the researchers wanted to know whether torsional cooling could be used as a refrigeration method.

steps.title: Reject results and background
steps.content: B reports a finding about temperature increases. C defines torsional heating and cooling. D defines torsion and describes heating. None of those states what the researchers wanted to investigate. The choice about torsional cooling and refrigeration presents the study's research question. The answer is A.
